plugins.name: kaeru
plugins.description: Japanese-first, guardrailed content editing for non-technical PMs: /start, /edit-text, /edit-image, /preview, /submit — git hidden, PR-only.

plugins.name: gh-flow
plugins.description: Issue-to-PR flow for repos using the kaeru issue-driven template: create-issue skill for the normal path, /create-pr command as the one-shot fallback for when the repo's auto-PR Action can't run.
